summary: Tested Phase 1B Store Pickup OTP Flow - Backend Only. All 11 tests PASSED. Retailer APIs (states-districts, by-location, recommend) working correctly. OTP verification endpoint properly returns 404 for non-existent orders. Admin endpoints correctly require authentication (403). 4 test retailers confirmed in database (Delhi x2, Mumbai, Bangalore).

minor.issue: Returns 'Could not determine your location' for Mumbai (400xxx) and Bangalore (560xxx) pincodes because PINCODE_COORDINATES mapping in shipping_config.py only includes Delhi NCR and Bihar prefixes. Fallback returns first retailer instead of nearest.

GET /api/retailers/states-districts.details: Returns 3 states (Delhi, Karnataka, Maharashtra) with correct district mappings. Response structure: {states: [...], state_districts: {...}}

GET /api/retailers/by-location.details: Returns 4 active retailers. Filters by state and district work correctly. Excludes sensitive fields (password_hash, gst_number).

GET /api/retailers/recommend.details: Works for Delhi pincodes (110xxx) - correctly recommends nearest store (2.1km). For Mumbai/Bangalore, falls back to first retailer due to missing coordinate mappings.

POST /api/store-pickup/verify-otp.details: Returns 404 for non-existent orders with message 'Order OTP not found'. Returns 422 for missing required fields. OTP model validation working.

GET /api/retailers/admin/list.details: Returns 403 without admin authentication. Requires admin session cookie.

POST /api/retailers/admin/create.details: Returns 403 without admin authentication. Requires admin session cookie.

Frontend PickupStoreSelector.details: Component has State→District→Retailer dropdowns, Top Recommended mode, and all required data-testid attributes (mode-recommended, mode-manual, select-state, select-district, select-recommended-store, etc.)

Frontend ThankYou page.details: Displays OTP for pickup orders when delivery_mode='self_pickup' and pickup_otp_code exists. Has data-testid='pickup-otp-code' for testing.

action_items: Consider adding Mumbai (400xxx) and Bangalore (560xxx) pincode prefixes to PINCODE_COORDINATES in /app/backend/services/shipping_config.py for better retailer recommendations
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Retailer endpoints properly separate public (by-location, states-districts, recommend) from admin (admin/list, admin/create)
✓ Admin endpoints correctly check is_admin_email() for authorization
✓ OTP verification endpoint validates order_number, otp_code, and retailer_id match
✓ Password hashes and sensitive data excluded from public API responses
✓ Frontend components have comprehensive data-testid attributes for testing
✓ ThankYou page conditionally renders OTP section only for pickup orders
seed_data_creation: 4 test retailers pre-created: RTL_DELHI001 (Karol Bagh), RTL_DELHI002 (Connaught Place), RTL_MUMBAI001 (Andheri), RTL_BLR001 (Koramangala)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1B Store Pickup with OTP verification is implemented. 4 retailers in DB (Delhi x2, Mumbai, Bangalore). Public APIs: /api/retailers/states-districts, /api/retailers/by-location, /api/retailers/recommend (works best for Delhi pincodes). OTP APIs: /api/store-pickup/verify-otp (needs real order with OTP), /api/store-pickup/otp/{order_number} (auth required). Admin APIs require 2FA. Frontend PickupStoreSelector has State→District→Retailer selection with 'Top Recommended' feature.
